**Release ID:** release-2026-03-05-phase0_week03  
**角色:** PM

**日期:** 2026-03-05  
**轮次:** Round 2 (QA+Dev闭环，待Security/SRE)

---

## 二、样本录入规范 (QA确认)

### 2.1 样本分配 (200条)

| 类型 | 占比 | 数量 | Week1-2累计 | Week3目标新增 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|-------------|---------------|------|
| 正常样本 | 70% | 140 | 56 | ≥84 | 标准执行路径 |
| 边界样本 | 20% | 40 | 16 | ≥24 | 极限值/空值/最大值 |
| 对抗样本 | 10% | 20 | 8 | ≥12 | 恶意输入/异常场景 |
| **合计** | **100%** | **200** | **80** | **≥120** | |

### 2.2 标注规范 (延续Week1 v2.0)

```yaml
sample:
  id: string          # 唯一标识 (e.g., SAMPLE_W3T1_001)
  type: normal|boundary|adversarial
  input:
    contract: object  # 契约输入 (4字段)
  expected:
    output: object    # 期望输出
    valid: boolean    # 期望是否有效
    errors: [string]  # 期望错误码 (如无效)
  metadata:
    created_at: timestamp
    author: string
    tags: [string]
    source: string    # 样本来源 (手动/自动生成)
  evidence:
    metric_value: number
    window: string
    sample_size: number
    source: string
```

### 2.3 录入流程

```
┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐
│  样本采集   │ →  │  标注录入   │ →  │  质量抽检   │ →  │  入库存储   │
│  (QA/Dev)   │    │  (YAML)     │    │  (≥95%)     │    │  (Git LFS)  │
└─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘
```

### 2.4 当前进度

| 指标 | 目标 | 当前 | 完成率 |
|------|------|------|--------|
| 累计样本数 | 200条 | 80条 | 40% |
| Week3新增 | ≥120条 | 待录入 | 0% |
| 正常样本 | 140条 | 56条 | 40% |
| 边界样本 | 40条 | 16条 | 40% |
| 对抗样本 | 20条 | 8条 | 40% |

---

## 三、质量抽检门禁 (QA确认)

### 3.1 抽检标准

| 指标 | 目标值 | 验证方法 | 频率 |
|------|--------|----------|------|
| 抽检通过率 | ≥95% | 随机抽样验证 | 每日 |
| 证据完整率 | 100% | evidence四元组检查 | 每样本 |
| 一致性 | ≥99% | 重复执行结果比对 | 每周 |
| 标注准确率 | ≥98% | 人工复核 | 每周 |

### 3.2 抽检流程

```yaml
spot_check:
  sample_size: 20      # 每日抽检20条
  method: random       # 随机抽样
  checker: QA          # QA负责
  pass_threshold: 0.95 # 95%通过率
  failure_action:      # 失败处理
    - "退回重标注"
    - "记录缺陷台账"
    - "累计2次失败→升级PM"
```

### 3.3 缺陷台账

| 缺陷ID | 描述 | 影响样本数 | 状态 | 责任人 |
|--------|------|------------|------|--------|
| DQ001 | 标注格式错误 | 待统计 | 🔄 Open | QA |
| DQ002 | 证据四元组缺失 | 待统计 | 🔄 Open | QA |
| DQ003 | 预期输出不一致 | 待统计 | 🔄 Open | QA+Dev |

---

## 四、回放执行器技术方案 (Dev确认)

### 4.1 执行器架构

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│            Playback Executor (Rust+并发)                 │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐     │
│  │  Sample     │  │  Execution  │  │  Comparison │     │
│  │  Loader     │  │  Engine     │  │  Engine     │     │
│  └─────────────┘  └─────────────┘  └─────────────┘     │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│              Concurrent Execution (tokio)                │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                    Output: Pass/Fail + Metrics           │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 4.2 接口规范

| 接口 | 方法 | 输入 | 输出 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|------|------|
| load_samples | GET | path, filter | [Sample] | 样本加载 |
| execute | POST | sample_id | ExecutionResult | 单次执行 |
| batch_execute | POST | [sample_id] | [ExecutionResult] | 批量执行 |
| compare | POST | expected, actual | CompareResult | 结果比对 |

### 4.3 性能目标

| 指标 | 目标值 | 验证方法 |
|------|--------|----------|
| 并发度 | ≥10 并行 | 压力测试 |
| 单样本执行延迟 | ≤50ms | 基准测试 |
| 200样本全量执行 | ≤30s | 端到端测试 |
| 内存占用 | ≤200MB | 资源监控 |

### 4.4 失败路径与恢复

| 失败模式 | 检测机制 | 恢复策略 |
|----------|----------|----------|
| 样本加载失败 | 校验和验证 | 重试3次→跳过记录 |
| 执行超时 | 超时监控(100ms) | 终止→记录→继续 |
| 比对失败 | 差异检测 | 记录差异→生成报告 |

---

│  ┌───────────┐  ┌───────────┐  ┌───────────┐          │
│  │   Build   │  │   Test    │  │  Report   │          │
│  │  (Rust)   │  │ (回放执行)│  │ (HTML)    │          │
│  └───────────┘  └───────────┘  └───────────┘          │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Trigger: push/PR → Sample Change Detection → Execute   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

# Phase0 Week3 对抗样本专项报告 (v1.0)

**Release ID**: release-2026-03-05-phase0_week03  
**审查角色**: Security Engineer  
**审查日期**: 2026-03-19  
**轮次**: Round 2 (全角色闭环)  
**阶段**: Phase0 Week3 - 回放集构建  
**决策**: ✅ APPROVED (条件式批准)

---

## 1. 对抗样本设计范围

基于 Phase0 Week2 威胁模型 v2.0 (12 威胁场景)，设计 20 条对抗样本覆盖全部攻击面：

| 组件 | 威胁场景数 | 对抗样本数 | 覆盖攻击类型 |
|------|------------|------------|-------------|
| Gateway | 3 | 5 | 身份伪造/DoS/篡改 |
| Executor | 3 | 5 | 越权/篡改/信息泄露 |
| Verifier | 3 | 5 | 篡改/绕过/DoS |
| Committer | 3 | 5 | 篡改/抵赖/信息泄露 |
| **合计** | **12** | **20** | **5 类攻击** |

---

## 2. 对抗样本 5 类攻击场景

### 2.1 注入攻击 (5 条样本)

### 4.2 执行器接口(Dev v2.0)

```rust
// src/replay_executor/lib.rs
pub struct ReplayExecutor {
    samples: Vec<Sample>,
    validator: ContractValidator,
    concurrency: usize,
}

impl ReplayExecutor {
    pub fn new(concurrency: usize) -> Self;
    pub fn load_samples(&mut self, path: &str) -> Result<usize>;
    pub fn execute(&self, sample: &Sample) -> ExecutionResult;
    pub fn execute_batch(&self, samples: &[Sample]) -> Vec<ExecutionResult>;
    pub fn verify_consistency(&self, expected: &Result, actual: &Result) -> bool;
    pub fn generate_report(&self) -> ReplayReport;
}

pub struct ReplayReport {
    pub total_samples: usize,
    pub passed: usize,
    pub failed: usize,
    pub consistency_rate: f64,
    pub slo_compliance: SLOMetrics,
    pub execution_time_ms: u64,
}
```

## 6. CI集成规范(SRE W3T5)

### 6.1 CI流水线设计

```yaml
# .github/workflows/replay_validation.yml
name: Replay Set Validation

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  replay_test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Load Replay Samples
        run: |
          echo "Loading ${SAMPLE_COUNT} samples..."
          ./scripts/load_samples.sh artifacts/replay_samples/week3/
      
      - name: Execute Replay
        run: |
          ./target/release/replay_executor \
            --samples 200 \
            --concurrency 4 \
            --report reports/replay_report.json
      
      - name: Quality Check
        run: |
          ./scripts/quality_check.sh \
            --threshold 0.95 \
            --report reports/quality_report.json
      
      - name: Upload Report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: replay-report
          path: reports/
```

### 3.2 回放执行器集成配置

```yaml
# .github/workflows/replay-test.yml
name: Replay Set Integration Test

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  replay-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:15
        env:
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
        options: >-
          --health-cmd pg_isready
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5
        ports:
          - 5432:5432
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3
    
    - name: Setup Rust
      uses: actions-rs/toolchain@v1
      with:
        toolchain: stable
        components: clippy, rustfmt
    
    - name: Download replay set
      uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
      with:
        name: replay-samples
        path: ./replay-samples
    
    - name: Run replay executor
      run: |
        cargo run --release --bin replay-executor \
          -- --samples ./replay-samples \
          --concurrency 4 \
          --timeout 30s \
          --output report.json
    
    - name: Quality gate check
      run: |
        python3 scripts/quality_gate.py \
          --report report.json \
          --pass-rate-threshold 0.95 \
          --evidence-completeness 1.0 \
          --consistency-threshold 0.99
    
    - name: Upload test report
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
      if: always()
      with:
        name: replay-test-report
        path: report.json
```
